creator: peterj@FreeBSD.org
text:
u-boot consistently reports:

eth1addr=56:3a:08:15:f8:e2
ethaddr=56:3a:08:15:f8:e3

But the kernel reports different MAC addresses on virtually every boot:

eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:bf:9e:8f:02
eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:bf:9e:8f:02
eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:ed:33:47:38
eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:e1:a4:cd:18
eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:5f:40:45:56
eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:c0:9f:1d:50
eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:3b:4c:ae:26
eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:5d:65:dd:b3
eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:e8:20:56:db
eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:9d:53:2e:bd
eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:27:26:8b:49
eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:a3:90:da:3b
eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:e0:4c:b6:c0
eqos0: Ethernet address: f2:00:e0:4c:b6:c0
